title: Artisanal Default
description: Upgrades vanilla with new models, textures, and tweaks!
body:
### Soon to be replaced!
This pack has been archived in favour of my new pack, **'Wisp's Reworked Vanilla'**, which makes slightly more drastic changes but still in tune with Vanilla. 

You are still welcome to use this older version and I'm keeping it up for archival purposes, but for modern updates and more features use my new pack!

<details>
<summary>Old Descripton Here</summary>


## 🖼️ Introduction:

This is my pet project that combines a bunch of edits, fixes, and expansions I have made to the vanilla experience, all while sticking tightly to the vanilla style and not going overboard! The primary focus for now is on tweaking and expanding bits of the game that stand out to me!

No mods are required, though once I hit 1.0.0 I'll start looking into features that take advantage of modded features like biome-specific mob variants.

## 📖 Feature List:

<details>
<summary>Click to reveal</summary>

### Blocks:
- Anvil has been remade
- Flower pot has been remade
- All fences and gates have a unique texture
- Most walls have a unique texture
- Cacti now rarely spawn with flowers
- Grass now occasionally has clovers
- Podzol now occasionally has clovers
- Mycelium now occasionally has clovers
- Grass path sides have been reshaded
- Lily pads have been remade and have variants, and also occasionally have flowers
- Melon has been reshaded slightly
- Water is slightly clearer
- All grass and foliage is slightly warmer
- Dandelions have been remade
- Beds have been remade to have a head and footboard
- All sandstone slabs have been remade
- All polished stone slabs have been remade
- All sandstone stairs have been remade to have their proper top textures
- Red and brown mushrooms have been remade and have variants
- Brown mushrooms now rarely appear on the sides of blocks they're on
- Farmland has a custom side texture
- All buttons have unique textures
- All pressure plates have unique textures
- Smooth stone and chiseled stone brick have been tweaked
- Chests and trapped chests have been remade

### Items:
- Flower pot item has been remade
- Reshaded all tools

### Entities:
- Cow, red mushroom, and brown mushroom have been remade
- Squid and glow squid have been remade
- All humanoid mobs have ears
- Tuxedo cat has been reshaded

### Misc:
- Shadow is now lower resolution to better fit the art style
- HUD hearts and armour icons have been remade
- Leather armour has been remade
- Crosshair has been tweaked

(Not in any particular order)

</details>

## 🎨 All of my Creations:

## 🤔 Frequently Asked Questions:

**Q: How do I install the pack?**  
A: Follow [this guide](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/).

**Q: Can you port this to Bedrock?**  
A: I currently have no plans to port this to Bedrock.

**Q: Can someone else port this to Bedrock?**  
A: No, I do not allow third-party ports of my packs.

**Q: Can you add this feature?**  
A: Maybe! Comment any suggestions and we can see what happens.

**Q: I found a bug!**  
A: Comment all bugs and I will fix them as soon as possible.

**Q: Does this pack work on X version?**  
A: Probably. In theory, the pack should work on most modern versions. Though I do not support older versions of Minecraft. 

**Q: Can I add this to my modpack?**  
A: Of course! You must give credit and can not claim any of my work as your own.

## ✨ Inspirations:

These creators inspire some features in this pack, please check out their amazing work!

- [Sixfootblue](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sixfootblue/)
- [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Sully](https://twitter.com/ModSully)

</details>
